CustomField.label: Product Family
CustomField.description: The family this sellable variant belongs to. MODELED AS LOOKUP (not Master-Detail): a standard object like Product2 cannot be the detail side of a master-detail relationship. Required + Restrict delete preserves the "a variant must belong to a family" intent and blocks deleting a family that still has variants, without cascade-deleting products that carry order history. See decisions-log Product domain materialization finding.
